per_bead.note: Helper unit tests (TestNormalizeImpactedDomains{KeepsDomainDirNameVerbatim,GlobResolvesPathEntry,ZeroOwnerErrors,AmbiguousOwnerErrors}) and divergence gate tests are all genuine RED pins on the current binary. Verified current behavior: divergence.go ~L142 builds candidateDomains from meta.Domains verbatim, so a file-path entry 'internal/genevieve/review.py' drives LoadOwnership(root,'internal/genevieve/review.py') -> absent manifest -> changed file matches no candidate -> adr-divergence-unowned. *FilePathImpactedDomainResolves asserts ZERO unowned: FAILS now, GREEN after the helper feeds the resolved 'genevieve' name. AmbiguousOwnerErrors is constructible hermetically: the L28-29 ownership_test.go fixture (alpha+beta both claim internal/foo/**) already exists and yields a >1-owner overlap. Plan-gate tests (TestPlanCoverageFilePathImpactedResolves / TestCheckADRCitationsFilePathImpactedResolves / TestNormalizeZeroAndAmbiguousAtPlanGate) are genuine RED: checkADRCoverage (plan.go ~L516) and checkADRCitations (~L465) iterate raw impacted strings by name, so a file-path entry yields spurious adr-coverage-missing/adr-cite-irrelevant today. ValidatePlan(root,specID) has root + on-disk ownerRef=='' path, so the helper reads .mindspec/docs/domains/ via LoadOwnership/listDomainDirs with NO executor. R2 split: TestPlanCoverageHintMentionsExistingADR is a genuine RED pin (L529 message currently only emits 'mindspec adr create --domain X', no existing-ADR remedy); TestPlanCoverageHintCreateWhenNoCitation is a regression GUARD (create remedy already present), correctly framed by the plan. CAVEAT (non-blocking): plan-gate fixtures writeTestSpec/writeTestADRWithDomains write under root/docs/ (legacy layout) while LoadOwnership/listDomainDirs always read root/.mindspec/docs/domains/; the new plan-gate tests MUST write OWNERSHIP manifests via writeManifest (same package, .mindspec path), not under the legacy docs/ root, or the helper sees zero domains. The writeManifest helper supports this; it is an authoring note, not a viability blocker. All hermetic: MockExecutor / nil exec, no LLM/harness/network.

TestAdrShowWorktree* is a genuine RED pin: adrListCmd.RunE (adr.go ~L97) and adrShowCmd.RunE (~L138) use workspace.FindRoot, which resolves a worktree back to main, so a worktree-local ADR is invisible today -> fails to find/render; after switching to FindLocalRoot/overlay it resolves. Hermetic via existing setupWorktreePair (hand-crafted .git/worktrees linkage) + chdir helpers in adr_test.go, invoking RunE directly like the existing TestADRCreate_* tests. Authoring note: the test must capture stdout (or assert no-error + store.Get) to confirm 'rendered with Domain(s)'; constructible. TestParseADR_NonListDomainLine is a regression GUARD, not a RED pin (parse.go L74 strings.Contains('**Domain(s)**:') already accepts both list and non-list forms) -- the plan explicitly frames it as locking current behavior with the parser unchanged, which is correct.

Both are genuine RED pins. TestScaffoldPlanEmitsADRCitations: scaffoldPlan (spec.go L228-263) emits status/spec_id/version but NO adr_citations key -> assertion for the literal 'adr_citations' in the frontmatter region FAILS now, GREEN after. TestValidatePlanCitationsWarnNamesKey: the empty-citations WARN (plan.go L141) text is 'no ADR citations in frontmatter ...' and does NOT contain the literal 'adr_citations' -> FAILS now, GREEN after the message names the key. WARN branch is hermetically reachable via makePlanWithSections(empty citations, hasADRFitness=true) -- proven by the existing TestValidatePlan_EmptyCitations_WithFitness_IsWarning template. -run filters 'TestScaffoldPlan' and 'TestValidatePlanCitations' match the new names.

summary: All three beads' RED pins verified against the current unfixed binary. Bead 4ft2: divergence + plan-gate file-path tests genuinely fail today (candidateDomains/checkADRCoverage/checkADRCitations consume raw file-path strings -> adr-divergence-unowned / adr-coverage-missing / adr-cite-irrelevant) and pass after normalize-at-source; the >1-owner ambiguity is hermetically constructible via the existing alpha+beta overlapping-glob fixture; helper runs on the plan path with ownerRef=='' (on-disk, no executor). Bead 3cfr: TestAdrShowWorktree* is a genuine RED pin on the FindRoot->main resolution, hermetic via setupWorktreePair; the parse test is a correctly-labeled regression guard. Bead gpoq: both scaffold and WARN-text tests fail RED now (no adr_citations key; WARN omits the literal key) and pass after, reachable hermetically via existing fixtures. Three correctly-identified regression guards (TestParseADR non-list, TestPlanCoverageHintCreateWhenNoCitation) are framed as locks, not claimed as new RED pins -- not vacuous. One non-blocking authoring note: the new plan-gate tests must write OWNERSHIP manifests via writeManifest (.mindspec path), not under writeTestSpec's legacy docs/ root, since LoadOwnership/listDomainDirs read only .mindspec/docs/domains/.
